emails.subject: Contacts for Calgary Trip
emails.body: Contacts for Calgary Trip McKay, I have reserved Buchanan's for Thursday, Aug 16. I need to contact some marketers to tell them about the outing. There will be some food/drinks and a very short introduction of the FX products. Please provide contacts for the following firms: Duke Mirant Transcanada Aquila Canada Dynegy Reliant Sempra Engage Energy Canada Utilicorp and any other marketer you think will be interested. Would like to start calling tomorrow. Thx, Stuart

emails.subject: RE: Contacts for Calgary Trip
emails.body: RE: Contacts for Calgary Trip Stuart, Here are the names and phone numbers of the people you wanted: Duke Brad Daily (403) 297 9847 Mirant Russ Wilson (403) 218 1085 Transcanada Greg Shea (403) 216 2985 Currently being sold not likely to transact Aquila Canada Mike Kardash/Dave Lake (403) 781 6052 Dynegy Darren Marine (403) 213 6040 Reliant Willian Wong (403) 515 2837 Sempra Gracen Turnbull (403) 750 2465 Engage Energy Canada John Krill (403) 297 0337 Utilicorp Same as Aquila Others that might come and will at least advertise to the rest of the industry are: AEC Storage Hub Dean Giesbrecht (403) 266 8285 CrossAlta Gas Storage Vince Landry (403) 298 3578 Unocal Trevor Caldwell (403) 213 7423 Regards, Jon To: Mckay, Jonathan
